headline.purpose: Page titles and major section headers. One per view.

title.purpose: Card titles, tab labels, named sections within a view.

body.purpose: Prose, descriptions, and data context text. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Field labels, table headers, button text, navigation links.

caption.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, chart axis labels, KPI supporting context.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for card containers on bg-base. Not for list items or inline components.

shadows.name: shadow-button
shadows.purpose: Hover state only on brand primary button. Brand-color-tinted — inherits themeColor in dashboard context.

shadows.name: shadow-elegant
shadows.purpose: Modal overlays and the Preview Dashboard featured card. Brand-tinted. Never at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (button hover, input focus, badge state change).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: button hover, input focus, badge transitions.

components.name: Brand Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA within brand dashboard contexts. Fill color inherits the brand's themeColor.
components.css: .ds-btn-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: #3B82F6; color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-brand:hover { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.9); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px -2px rgba(59,130,246,0.3); } .ds-btn-brand:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005660; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-brand:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Platform Primary Button
components.description: Platform-level CTA — registration flow, global nav actions. Always Certification Teal.
components.css: .ds-btn-platform { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: #005660; color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-platform:hover { background: rgba(0,86,96,0.9); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px -2px rgba(0,86,96,0.3); } .ds-btn-platform:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005660; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-platform:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Gradient Button
components.description: One-per-page promotional CTA only. Teal → Violet gradient. Not a general-purpose button.
components.css: .ds-btn-gradient { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #005660, #8135F3); color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-gradient:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 24px -4px rgba(129,53,243,0.35); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-gradient:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005660; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-gradient { transition: none; } .ds-btn-gradient:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action alongside a primary. Used for 'Previous', 'Exit Dashboard', 'Remove Logo'.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; background: #FCFCFC; color: #21242C; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #E0EBE4; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F3F5F7; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px -4px rgba(33,36,44,0.08); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005660; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Navigation-level and tertiary actions. Bell icon, Back to Home, inline text actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #21242C; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F3F5F7; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #005660; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field used throughout the registration flow and settings.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #21242C; } .ds-input { height: 40px; width: 100%; padding: 0 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #21242C; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #E0EBE4; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7B8999; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #005660; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,86,96,0.2); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Primary container for grouped content. One level of nesting only — never nest cards.
components.html:
Brand Information

Tell us about your brand and business.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #E0EBE4; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px -4px rgba(33,36,44,0.08); } .ds-card__title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #21242C; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card__body { margin: 0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #7B8999; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Brand approval status indicator. Three states: Pending, Active, Rejected. Text + background tint, no icons.
components.html: Pending ReviewActiveRejected
components.css: .ds-badges { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-badge--pending { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12); color: #B45309; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(22,162,73,0.12); color: #15803D; } .ds-badge--rejected { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); color: #B91C1C; }

components.name: Dashboard Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky top bar present on all dashboard views. Contains brand identity, status badge, and exit action.
components.html:
EcoBrand

Brand Dashboard

Active
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; height: 64px; background: rgba(252,252,252,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid #E0EBE4; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; } .ds-header__brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-header__logo { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #005660, #8135F3); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-header__name { margin: 0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #21242C; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-header__sub { margin: 0; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: #7B8999; } .ds-header__actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-ghost--icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-btn-outline--sm { height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; font-size: 13px; background: #FCFCFC; color: #21242C; border: 1px solid #E0EBE4; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline--sm:hover { background: #F3F5F7; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(22,162,73,0.12); color: #15803D; } .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #21242C; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F3F5F7; }

narrative.overview:
BrandHub is where sustainability claims become documented fact. It combines the institutional authority of a certification board, the precision of an impact ledger, and the navigable clarity of a field report. A brand manager must be able to pull CO₂ savings for a quarterly board deck in under two minutes. An enterprise sustainability lead must trust what they see. The aesthetic IS the audit trail: structured, navigable, and built to survive a screenshot.

The system rejects two failure modes with equal force. First: the greenwashing aesthetic — leaf icons, earth-tone gradients, stock-photo warmth — where the design substitutes for the data. Second: the generic SaaS scaffold — hero metric cards, cool-blue palette, identical card grids — that announces this was built from a template.

Color strategy is restrained. Platform Teal appears only in global navigation and registration. Inside brand dashboards, CSS --primary is replaced by the brand's own themeColor at runtime. Each dashboard becomes a credible extension of the brand's identity.
keyCharacteristics: One typeface family, in multiple weights only — system-ui for zero latency and native rendering
Platform teal for platform context; brand color for brand dashboard context — never compete
Three named shadows, each with a specific structural role; decorative elevation is prohibited
Every metric shown with context: no bare KPIs, always a comparator or real-world equivalent
Standard affordances throughout — no invented patterns

rules.name: The Dynamic Brand Rule
rules.body: Inside any /dashboard/:brandId route, platform Certification Teal must not appear as a fill color. All primary fills use the brand's themeColor. The dashboard is the brand's space; the platform is a frame.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Precision Violet is used in two places only: the gradient button variant and secondary interactive states. Never as a background, card tint, or decorative element.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: No second typeface is permitted. Monospace for code is the only exception, and only if code appears in the interface.

rules.name: The Context Requirement
rules.body: A number without a unit, comparator, or time frame is prohibited. '8.4 tons CO₂ saved — 24% above category average' is a fact. '8.4' is not.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No shadow at rest except shadow-card on explicit card containers. List items, table rows, tab panels, and inline components are flat.

rules.name: The Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: shadow-button and shadow-elegant use the current --primary color. The shadow inherits the brand identity. Hardcoded colored shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do use Certification Teal (#005660) for global navigation, the registration CTA, and platform-level buttons only
Do show every metric with a denominator, a comparison, or a real-world equivalent
Do apply shadow-card to card containers; keep list items and table rows flat
Do verify all body and caption text at ≥4.5:1 contrast on their background
Do use the system-ui font stack — no web fonts
Do give every interactive element a visible keyboard focus state using the 2px platform-teal outline
Do use the Status Badge component for brand status — text + background tint, no icons, always caption size
donts: Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label + gradient accent card)
Don't build identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text, repeated)
Don't use the generic SaaS scaffold — cool-blue primary, identical card grids, gradient-to-white hero sections
Don't use leaf icons, earth-tone gradients, or stock-photo eco imagery to signal sustainability
Don't use Precision Violet as a background fill, section tint, or decorative element
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient background)
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px as a colored accent)
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively — backdrop-filter permitted on sticky nav header only
Don't apply shadow-button or shadow-elegant at rest
Don't place a card inside a card
